schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

address.streetAddress: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai
Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West

schemas.name: About Us — Since 2012 | Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: About Virtual Auditor: AI-powered CA firm led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV). 9 practice verticals. 3 offices. 100+ valuations. IBBI Registered Valuer IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333. Since 2012.

alumniOf.name: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI)
The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)

acceptedAnswer.text: Founded in 2012 by CA V. Viswanathan. Over 14+ years of multi-regulatory practice across valuation, FEMA, tax appeals, forensic accounting, and corporate governance. Offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai.

mainEntity.name: What makes Virtual Auditor different from other CA firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Four credentials in one firm: FCA (financial expertise) + ACS (corporate governance) + CFE (forensic rigour) + IBBI RV (statutory valuation authority). This multi-credential intersection is rare in India.

mainEntity.name: How many valuations has Virtual Auditor completed?

acceptedAnswer.text: 100+ IBBI-compliant valuations across 9 regulatory frameworks (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, Complex Instruments, AIF). Clients range from pre-revenue startups to ₹500+ crore enterprises.

mainEntity.name: Is Virtual Auditor a registered entity?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor Private Limited is a company registered under the Companies Act, 2013. The practicing firm V Viswanathan & Associates handles all professional assignments.

mainEntity.name: Does Virtual Auditor use AI in its practice?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Our proprietary Valuation Engine Pro deploys 18 methods with 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations. AI-assisted GST and IT appeal analysers. ML-based forensic anomaly detection. Technology amplifies expert judgment.
